title: File restriction (Zapier)

posts.author: edan (Edan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I finally figured out a way to post directly from Monday using Zapier.

The issue I’m facing now is that files are protected, which causes an issue to publish to Facebook.

What’s the best way to go about this? Is there a way to make images not protected?
